proof_trace: In the `send()` error path (lines 855-859), `close_and_free_remote(remote)` and `close_and_free_server(server)` are called but there is no `return` statement, unlike every other cleanup branch in the same function (lines 816-818, 826-828, 841-843 all return). Execution falls through to lines 869-870 where `setsockopt(server->fd, ...)` and `setsockopt(remote->fd, ...)` dereference both fully-freed structs — `ss_free(remote)` is confirmed in `free_remote()` at line 979.
attack_scenario: An attacker connects through ss-local (SOCKS5 client), causes the remote shadowsocks server to send data, then forcefully closes their local TCP connection; when ss-local's `send(server->fd, ...)` back to the client fails with EPIPE/ECONNRESET (non-EAGAIN), the missing `return` causes `setsockopt(remote->fd, ...)` to dereference the freed `remote` struct, yielding a use-after-free exploitable for memory corruption or crash.
reason: GT RA-U3-O1一致。remote_recv_cb()でremoteがclose_and_free_remote()後にremote->fdで参照。既知の旧バグ。

proof_trace: `resolv_query()` (resolv.c:203-208) calls `query_free_cb(query)` to free the `query_t` object when all DNS submissions fail, but then falls through to `return cb_data` instead of `return NULL`, leaving `server->query` as a non-NULL dangling pointer to freed memory. When any subsequent `close_and_free_server` call fires, `resolv_cancel` reads `client_free_cb`/`client_cb_data` from the already-freed `cb_data` (UAF) and invokes `query_free_cb(query)` a second time, producing a double-free of the same `query_t` allocation.
attack_scenario: An attacker floods the shadowsocks-libev server with connection requests requiring DNS resolution, exhausting the udns query pool so that `dns_submit_a4` (and/or `dns_submit_a6`) returns NULL; the dangling `server->query` pointer then causes a double-free heap corruption when the connection is subsequently timed out or closed, enabling heap exploitation.
reason: resolv_query()でall_queries_are_null(cb_data)時にclient_free_cb(cb_data->client_cb_data)とss_free(cb_data)で解放した後、return cb_dataで解放済みポインタを返す。server->queryにdangling pointerが保存され、後続のclose_and_free_server→resolv_cancelでUAF+double-free。コード実確認済み（resolv.c L203-211）。最新ではリファクタリングにより修正済み。GT外の新発見。
